original: For the first time in history more people live in towns than in the country.
translation_literal: 历史上第一次，住在城镇里的人比住在乡村里的人更多。

chunks.english: For the first time in history
chunks.relation: 说明这一现象首次出现

chunks.english: in towns than in the country
chunks.chinese: 在城镇里而不是在乡村里
chunks.relation: 说明居住地点并形成比较

original: In Britain this has had a curious result.
translation_literal: 在英国，这产生了一个奇特的结果。

chunks.relation: 作 has had 的宾语

original: While polls show Britons rate “the countryside” alongside the royal family, Shakespeare and the National Health Service (NHS) as what makes them proudest of their country, this has limited political support.
translation_literal: 尽管民意调查显示，英国人把“乡村”和王室、莎士比亚以及国民医疗服务体系并列，视为最让他们为国家自豪的东西，但这在政治上得到的支持有限。

chunks.english: While polls show Britons rate the countryside alongside the royal family, Shakespeare and the National Health Service as what makes them proudest of their country
chunks.chinese: 尽管民调显示英国人把乡村和王室、莎士比亚及NHS并列视为最让他们自豪的东西

chunks.relation: 让步状语从句内部主语
让步状语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: Britons rate the countryside alongside the royal family, Shakespeare and the National Health Service as what makes them proudest of their country
chunks.chinese: 英国人把乡村和王室、莎士比亚及NHS并列视为最让他们自豪的东西
chunks.relation: 作 show 的宾语内容

chunks.english: what makes them proudest of their country
chunks.chinese: 最让他们为国家自豪的东西
chunks.relation: 作 rate...as 的宾语补足内容

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A alongside B, C and D
sentence_patterns.explanation: the countryside 与 royal family、Shakespeare、NHS 并列，构成英国人引以为傲的对象。

original: A century ago Octavia Hill launched the National Trust not to rescue stylish houses but to save “the beauty of natural places for everyone forever.”
translation_literal: 一个世纪前，奥克塔维娅·希尔创立国民信托，不是为了拯救时髦宅邸，而是为了永远为每个人保存自然之地的美。

chunks.english: not to rescue stylish houses but to save the beauty of natural places for everyone forever
chunks.chinese: 不是为了拯救时髦宅邸而是为了保存自然之地的美
不是为了拯救时髦宅邸

chunks.english: but to save the beauty of natural places for everyone forever
chunks.chinese: 而是为了永远为每个人保存自然之地的美

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: not to A but to B
sentence_patterns.explanation: not to rescue... but to save... 形成目的上的否定与转折，重点在 but 后。

original: It was specifically to provide city dwellers with spaces for leisure where they could experience “a refreshing air.”
translation_literal: 它专门是为了给城市居民提供休闲空间，在那里他们可以体验“清新的空气”。

chunks.english: specifically to provide city dwellers with spaces for leisure
chunks.chinese: 专门为了给城市居民提供休闲空间
chunks.relation: 作 was 的表语，说明目的

chunks.english: where they could experience a refreshing air
chunks.chinese: 在那里他们可以体验清新的空气

chunks.relation: where 定语从句内部主语
where 定语从句内部谓语

original: Hill’s pressure later led to the creation of national parks and green belts.
translation_literal: 希尔的推动后来促成了国家公园和绿化带的建立。

chunks.english: the creation of national parks and green belts
chunks.chinese: 国家公园和绿化带的建立
chunks.relation: 作 led to 的宾语

original: They don’t make countryside any more, and every year concrete consumes more of it.
translation_literal: 人们不再制造乡村，而每年混凝土都会吞噬更多乡村。

chunks.english: They don’t make countryside any more
and every year concrete consumes more of it
chunks.chinese: 而每年混凝土都会吞噬更多乡村

original: It needs constant guardianship.
translation_literal: 它需要持续守护。

original: At the next election none of the big parties seem likely to endorse this sentiment.
translation_literal: 在下一次选举中，没有一个大党似乎可能支持这种情绪。

original: The Conservatives’ planning reform explicitly gives rural development priority over conservation, even authorising “off-plan” building where local people might object.
translation_literal: 保守党的规划改革明确赋予农村开发高于保护的优先地位，甚至批准当地人可能反对的“计划外”建设。

chunks.chinese: 农村开发高于保护的优先地位

chunks.english: even authorising off-plan building where local people might object
chunks.chinese: 甚至批准当地人可能反对的计划外建设
chunks.relation: 补充说明改革的进一步做法

chunks.chinese: 当地人可能反对的地方

original: The concept of sustainable development has been defined as profitable.
translation_literal: 可持续发展的概念已经被定义为有利可图。

chunks.relation: 补充说明 concept 被定义成什么

original: Labour likewise wants to discontinue local planning where councils oppose development.
translation_literal: 工党同样想要停止地方规划，在那些地方议会反对开发的地方尤其如此。

chunks.relation: 作 wants 的宾语内容

chunks.chinese: 地方议会反对开发的地方
chunks.relation: 修饰 local planning 的适用场景

original: The Liberal Democrats are silent.
translation_literal: 自由民主党保持沉默。

original: Only Ukip, sensing its chance, has sided with those pleading for a more considered approach to using green land.
translation_literal: 只有英国独立党察觉到自己的机会，站到了那些呼吁以更审慎方式使用绿地的人一边。

chunks.relation: 现在分词插入语，说明 Ukip 的动机

chunks.english: those pleading for a more considered approach to using green land
chunks.chinese: 那些呼吁以更审慎方式使用绿地的人
chunks.relation: 作 sided with 的宾语

chunks.english: pleading for a more considered approach to using green land
chunks.chinese: 呼吁以更审慎方式使用绿地的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语 + 分词短语 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: sensing its chance 插在主语和谓语之间，真正主干是 Only Ukip has sided with those...。

original: Its Campaign to Protect Rural England struck terror into many local Conservative parties.
translation_literal: 其“保护英格兰乡村运动”让许多地方保守党组织感到恐惧。

chunks.english: Its Campaign to Protect Rural England
chunks.chinese: 其保护英格兰乡村运动
进入许多地方保守党组织心中

original: The sensible place to build new houses, factories and offices is where people are, in cities and towns where infrastructure is in place.
translation_literal: 建造新房屋、工厂和办公室的合理地点，是人们所在的地方，即基础设施已经到位的城市和城镇。

chunks.english: The sensible place to build new houses, factories and offices
chunks.chinese: 建造新房屋、工厂和办公室的合理地点

chunks.english: to build new houses, factories and offices
chunks.chinese: 建造新房屋、工厂和办公室的

chunks.relation: where 表语从句内部主语
where 表语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: in cities and towns where infrastructure is in place
chunks.chinese: 即在基础设施到位的城市和城镇中
chunks.relation: 解释 where people are 的具体地点

chunks.chinese: 基础设施已经到位的地方

chunks.relation: where 定语从句内部主语
where 定语从句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: where 从句 + in cities and towns...
sentence_patterns.explanation: in cities and towns... 是对 where people are 的具体解释。

original: The London agents Stirling Ackroyd recently identified enough sites for half a million houses in the London area alone, with no intrusion on green belt.
translation_literal: 伦敦地产代理公司Stirling Ackroyd最近仅在伦敦地区就确定了足够建造五十万套住房的地点，而且不会侵入绿化带。

chunks.chinese: 伦敦地产代理公司Stirling Ackroyd

chunks.english: enough sites for half a million houses in the London area alone
chunks.chinese: 仅在伦敦地区足够建造五十万套住房的地点

chunks.english: with no intrusion on green belt
chunks.relation: 说明开发这些地点不会造成的影响

chunks.chinese: 足够建造五十万套住房的
chunks.relation: 修饰 enough sites，说明地点容量
说明 identified 的地点范围

original: What is true of London is even truer of the provinces.
translation_literal: 对伦敦真实的情况，对各省来说甚至更加真实。

chunks.relation: 作主句 is 的表语

original: The idea that “housing crisis” equals “concreted meadows” is pure lobby talk.
translation_literal: “住房危机”等于“被混凝土覆盖的草地”这一想法纯粹是游说话术。

chunks.english: that housing crisis equals concreted meadows
chunks.chinese: 即住房危机等于被混凝土覆盖的草地
chunks.relation: 解释 The idea 的具体内容

sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 idea 的具体内容。

original: The issue is not the need for more houses but, as always, where to put them.
translation_literal: 问题不是需要更多房屋，而是一如既往，应该把它们建在哪里。

chunks.english: not the need for more houses

chunks.relation: 插入说明这一问题一直如此

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: not A but, as always, B
sentence_patterns.explanation: as always 插入在 but 后，真正对比是 not the need... but where to put them。

original: Under lobby pressure, George Osborne favours rural new-build against urban renovation and renewal.
translation_literal: 在游说压力下，乔治·奥斯本偏爱乡村新建，而不是城市翻修和更新。

chunks.chinese: 相对于城市翻修和更新

original: He favours out-of-town shopping sites against high streets.
translation_literal: 他偏爱城外购物场所，而不是商业街。

original: This is not a free market but a biased one.
translation_literal: 这不是一个自由市场，而是一个有偏向的市场。

chunks.chinese: 而是一个有偏向的市场

original: Rural towns and villages have grown and will always grow.
translation_literal: 乡村城镇和村庄已经发展，并且将永远发展。

original: They do so best where building sticks to their edges and respects their character.
translation_literal: 在建设贴着它们的边缘并尊重其特色的地方，它们发展得最好。

chunks.english: where building sticks to their edges and respects their character
chunks.chinese: 在建设贴着其边缘并尊重其特色的地方
chunks.relation: 说明发展最佳的条件/地点
where 状语从句内部主语
作 sticks to 的宾语

original: We do not ruin urban conservation areas.
translation_literal: 我们不会毁掉城市保护区。

original: Why ruin rural ones?
translation_literal: 为什么要毁掉乡村保护区呢？

original: Development should be planned, not let rip.
translation_literal: 开发应该被规划，而不是任其失控。

chunks.relation: 省略 should be 的对照谓语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: should be planned, not let rip
sentence_patterns.explanation: not let rip 前省略 should be，形成 planned 与 let rip 的对照。

original: After the Netherlands, Britain is Europe’s most crowded country.
translation_literal: 仅次于荷兰，英国是欧洲最拥挤的国家。

original: Half a century of town and country planning has enabled it to retain an enviable rural coherence, while still permitting low-density urban living.
translation_literal: 半个世纪的城乡规划使它能够保持令人羡慕的乡村协调性，同时仍允许低密度的城市生活。

chunks.english: Half a century of town and country planning

chunks.relation: 作 enabled 的宾语，指 Britain

chunks.english: to retain an enviable rural coherence
chunks.chinese: 保持令人羡慕的乡村协调性
chunks.relation: 补充说明 it 能做的事

chunks.english: while still permitting low-density urban living
chunks.chinese: 同时仍允许低密度城市生活

chunks.relation: while 省略结构中的动作

sentence_patterns.explanation: while still permitting 省略了主语和 be，可理解为 while it is still permitting。

original: There is no doubt of the alternative — the corrupted landscapes of southern Portugal, Spain or Ireland.
translation_literal: 另一种选择毫无疑问就是葡萄牙南部、西班牙或爱尔兰被破坏的景观。

chunks.english: There is no doubt of the alternative

chunks.chinese: 对另一种选择没有疑问

chunks.english: the corrupted landscapes of southern Portugal, Spain or Ireland
chunks.chinese: 葡萄牙南部、西班牙或爱尔兰被破坏的景观
chunks.relation: 破折号后解释 alternative 的具体内容

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 抽象名词 + 破折号解释
sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号后的 landscapes 解释 alternative 指的是什么。

original: Avoiding this rather than promoting it should unite the left and right of the political spectrum.
translation_literal: 避免这种情况而不是促进它，应该使政治光谱的左翼和右翼联合起来。

chunks.english: Avoiding this rather than promoting it
chunks.chinese: 避免这种情况而不是促进它

chunks.relation: 与 Avoiding this 形成取舍对比

chunks.english: the left and right of the political spectrum
chunks.chinese: 政治光谱的左翼和右翼
